name: Silencer
description: Enemies should be seen and not heard. Nortrom, the Silencer Enchants an enemy unit while granting vision over it. Deals damage corresponding to the difference between Silencer and the affected unit.

abilities.name: Brain Drain
abilities.description: Increases both the self gain and enemy loss.

abilities.name: Suffer In Silence
abilities.description: Grants Silencer outgoing damage amplification against silenced units. Damage sources from silenced units are less effective on Silencer.

abilities.name: Arcane Curse
abilities.description: Applies a curse on affected enemy units within the radius, dealing damage over time and slowing their movement speed.

abilities.name: Glaives of Wisdom
abilities.description: Grants self bonus per attack projectile impact. The attack deals additional damage corresponding to Silencer's current intelligence. Although lacking in traditional incantations, Nortrom's pedigree of the Aeol Drias gives him uncanny wisdom, which he applies to physical combat.

abilities.name: Last Word
abilities.description: Enchants an enemy unit while granting vision over it. Deals damage corresponding to the difference between Silencer and the affected unit.

abilities.name: Global Silence
abilities.description: Applies Arcane Curse of its corresponding level to all silence-affected enemy heroes. The debuff has the same duration as the applied Global Silence debuff.
